name: Kaya no Haha
description: ~!During the Wall Rose invasion, she is left stranded in her town with her traumatized daughter as a Titan slowly eats her. Sasha Blouse arrives in the town to alert its citizens and finds the two women in the house they were left in. Sasha unsuccessfully attempts to cut the Titan's nape with an axe, and then notices the child in the room. Sasha apologizes to the mother as she decides to abandon her, and successfully takes her child to safety. The woman later dies from her wounds!~
